name: Paladin Danse | Fallout 4 | Training exercise | Brotherhood of Steel
description:
Danse finds himself in a painfully hard situation while conducting a training exercise with you 🤭

I was going for sheer awkwardness with this one, really. :D Poor Danse is already dying inside when the scenario starts but you can definitely make it worse for him. :D (Or comfort him instead. <3)

Smut is also an option, of course. I’ve added plenty of details on romantic behavior too, so a slow-burn romance would work just as well.

And sorry about the long intro, I really felt like the scenario required the build-up. :)

⬇️ Links to my other Danse bots at the bottom ⬇️

For more Fallout 4 content visit my profile :)

☕ 𝘌𝘯𝘫𝘰𝘺𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘰𝘭𝘦𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘺? 𝘞𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘪𝘯𝘷𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘧𝘧𝘦𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘴𝘢𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘬𝘴? 𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘦𝘴, 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘢 𝘵𝘪𝘱 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘮𝘺 𝘒𝘰-𝘧𝘪 𝘱𝘢𝘨𝘦. 𝘛𝘪𝘱𝘴 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘯𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘦𝘹𝘱𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥 — 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘴𝘶𝘱𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘬𝘦𝘦𝘱𝘴 𝘮𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘶𝘦 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 :)

For a better roleplay experience, I suggest using DeepSeek. You can access my DeepSeek guide here.

ᴛɪᴘꜱ ꜰᴏʀ DeepSeek ᴜꜱᴇʀꜱ: I suggest DeepSeek-R1 for a more intense experience (drama/angst/) and DeepSeek-V3 if you're looking for something milder (just pure fluff). Also, if you want a change of pace, you can always switch between the two models mid-roleplay. As for the temperature, I recommend around 0.4-0.5. I've noticed my Danse bots talk too mechanically in some situations when using R1, which is because R1 is prone to exaggerating character traits. Inserting a line such as "((OOC: Ease on the military language. Make sure Danse sounds more natural.))" is a quick fix to this issue.
